final_prompt.prompt:
Design an original, non-infringing employee ID card for "字节期动" (ByteDance parody), showing both front and back sides in a realistic product mockup.

Style/medium: photorealistic product photography, corporate ID card mockup with realistic plastic card texture
Composition: flat lay top-down view showing front and back of card side by side, 85mm lens, sharp focus on both cards
Subject: employee ID card for "字节期动", standard credit card size (86x54mm), with lanyard hole, realistic plastic surface
Scene/backdrop: clean neutral surface (light gray desk or white background), soft shadows beneath cards
Lighting/mood: soft diffused studio lighting from 45-degree angle, even illumination, professional product shot mood
Color palette: corporate blue and white base, clean minimalist design
Materials/textures: matte plastic card surface with slight gloss reflection, realistic printed text and photo placeholder
Text (verbatim): "字节期动"
Constraints: must show both front and back sides clearly; front side should include company logo area, employee photo placeholder, name field, ID number; back side should include barcode/QR code area and company address
Avoid: cartoonish illustration style, overly saturated colors, watermark, generic Behance mockup look, 8K stuffer text
